title: Squirrel Removal in Eastchester, Westchester | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Eastchester, Westchester. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Licensed experts serving Eastchester homes. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Squirrels in your Eastchester attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Eastchester and Westchester County. Our licensed technicians specialize in humane trapping, safe removal, and permanent exclusion to protect your home from future infestations.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Eastchester's residential communities, we understand the unique challenges posed by squirrel activity in this area's colonial and Tudor-style homes. Our team provides same-day emergency response, uses only humane removal methods, and offers industry-leading warranties on all exclusion work.
localContext: Eastchester's mature tree-lined streets and proximity to wooded areas like Twin Lakes Park make it particularly attractive to gray squirrels seeking attic access in older homes. The neighborhood's mix of pre-war colonials and mid-century residences often feature the architectural gaps and roof vulnerabilities that squirrels exploit for nesting.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Eastchester?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Eastchester typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. This includes inspection, humane trapping, removal, entry point sealing, and cleanup. We provide free estimates with transparent pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Eastchester home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Eastchester residents. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and their activity patterns. Our technicians will set humane traps and monitor them daily until all squirrels are safely removed from your property.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Eastchester homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause extensive damage to Eastchester homes by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaging insulation, gnawing on wooden beams and roof structures, and contaminating attics with urine and feces. They can also damage soffits, fascia boards, and roof vents while gaining entry, leading to costly repairs if not addressed promptly.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on squirrel exclusion work in Eastchester?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all exclusion and seal-up work performed in Eastchester. After removing all squirrels, we seal entry points with heavy-duty materials and conduct a thorough inspection to prevent re-entry. If squirrels return through our sealed areas within the warranty period, we'll return at no additional charge to resolve the issue.
